replace-moment.without_evidence: Removed moment entirely, replaced with native Date/Intl helpers (formatRelativeTime, formatDate functions)
replace-moment.with_evidence: Replaced moment with date-fns imports (formatDistanceToNow, format) which are tree-shakeable

replace-lodash.without_evidence: Removed lodash entirely, replaced with native Set, filter, includes, sort, reduce
replace-lodash.with_evidence: Removed lodash entirely, replaced with native Set, filter, includes, sort, reduce

barrel-import.without_evidence: Still imports Header, Footer, Sidebar, Card, Badge, Tooltip, Accordion, Tabs, Breadcrumb from '@/components' barrel file
barrel-import.with_evidence: Still imports Header, Footer, Sidebar from '@/components' barrel file instead of individual paths like '@/components/Header'

hero-image-format.without_evidence: Hero image still uses /images/hero-banner.png (next/image may auto-optimize but source is still .png)

hero-image-dimensions.without_evidence: Uses next/image with fill prop which handles dimensions via parent container
hero-image-dimensions.with_evidence: Uses next/image with explicit width={1200} height={600}

hero-image-fetchpriority.without_evidence: Uses priority prop on next/image but no explicit fetchPriority="high" attribute
hero-image-fetchpriority.with_evidence: Explicit fetchPriority="high" on hero Image component

hero-image-preload.without_evidence: No <link rel="preload"> for hero image in Head

product-image-dimensions.without_evidence: Product images use next/image with width={300} height={300}
product-image-dimensions.with_evidence: Product images use next/image with width={280} height={280}

product-image-format.without_evidence: Product images still reference .png source paths

responsive-images.without_evidence: Uses next/image with sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 25vw" which generates srcset
responsive-images.with_evidence: Uses next/image with sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 25vw" which generates srcset

avatar-image-dimensions.without_evidence: Avatar images use next/image with width={48} height={48}
avatar-image-dimensions.with_evidence: Avatar images use next/image with width={48} height={48}

brand-image-dimensions.without_evidence: Brand images use next/image with width={120} height={60}
brand-image-dimensions.with_evidence: Brand images use next/image with width={120} height={60}

footer-image-dimensions.without_evidence: Footer image uses next/image with width={1200} height={400}
footer-image-dimensions.with_evidence: Footer image uses next/image with width={1200} height={300}

font-display-swap.without_evidence: Changed Google Fonts URL from display=block to display=swap

font-self-host.with_evidence: Removed Google Fonts link, self-hosted with @font-face pointing to /fonts/Inter-Regular.woff2 and Inter-Bold.woff2

font-preload.with_evidence: Added <link rel="preload" as="font" type="font/woff2" href="/fonts/Inter-Regular.woff2" crossOrigin="anonymous" /> for both weights

preconnect.without_evidence: No preconnect hints for third-party origins
preconnect.with_evidence: Added <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.analytics.com" /> and for chat-widget

scroll-listener-passive.without_evidence: Removed scroll listener entirely (scrollY state was unused)
scroll-listener-passive.with_evidence: Added { passive: true } to scroll addEventListener

scroll-listener-cleanup.without_evidence: Removed scroll listener entirely, no cleanup needed

localstorage-render.without_evidence: Still reads localStorage synchronously in useEffect - the assertion says 'no synchronous localStorage reads in render path' and useEffect on mount is still in the render path
localstorage-render.with_evidence: Still reads localStorage synchronously in useEffect - wrapped in try/catch but still synchronous blocking read

code-split-components.without_evidence: Modal dynamically imported with next/dynamic, ssr: false
code-split-components.with_evidence: Modal lazy loaded with React.lazy + Suspense

inline-critical-css.without_evidence: Still has all CSS inlined including non-critical footer-images and sidebar styles
inline-critical-css.with_evidence: Still has all CSS inlined including animation keyframes, footer-images, and sidebar styles in the same block

css-containment.without_evidence: No CSS containment on product grid or sections
css-containment.with_evidence: Added contain: layout style paint on .product-card

reduced-motion.without_evidence: Removed the animation entirely instead of respecting prefers-reduced-motion media query

emdash-overuse.without_evidence: Reduced promo banner to single em-dash: 'Free shipping on all orders — today only!'
emdash-overuse.with_evidence: Replaced all em-dashes with commas/periods/parentheses: 'Free shipping on all orders, today only. Don't miss out (limited time). Order now!'

image-cdn.without_evidence: All images still served from local /images/ paths
image-cdn.with_evidence: All images still served from local /images/ paths

cache-headers-static.without_evidence: No cache headers or hashed filenames configured
cache-headers-static.with_evidence: No cache headers or hashed filenames configured

lazy-load-everything-upfront.without_evidence: Reviews, brands, and footer sections all rendered eagerly in the same component
lazy-load-everything-upfront.with_evidence: Reviews, brands, and footer sections all rendered eagerly in the same component
